metadata.description: Give Claude a video input -- fully local. /watch downloads, extracts frames, and transcribes on a self-provisioned portable runtime (no Docker) -- on your NVIDIA GPU when one is detected, on CPU otherwise. No cloud APIs.

plugins.name: watch-local
plugins.description: Watch a video (URL, local path, or UNC share). Auto-detects NVIDIA GPU (NVDEC decode + CUDA whisper) with CPU-only fallback. Faster-whisper large-v3 by default on GPU, small recommended on CPU. Always compares against creator-provided captions when present.
